sourceMovie.title: Dick Tracy
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Dick Tracy works as a adventure movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The adventure and comedy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Rush Hour
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Dick Tracy clicked for you, Rush Hour (1998) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy and crime, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Dick Tracy clicked for you, Rush Hour 2 (2001) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy and crime, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Batman: Mask of the Phantasm
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Dick Tracy clicked for you, Batman: Mask of the Phantasm (1993) is a strong next stop: both trade in adventure and crime, with earned warmth without mush. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: The Dark Knight Rises
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Dick Tracy clicked for you, The Dark Knight Rises (2012) is a strong next stop: both trade in crime, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Dick Tracy?
faq.answer: Try Rush Hour, Rush Hour 2, Rush Hour 3—each shares DNA with Dick Tracy while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Dick Tracy?
faq.answer: Dick Tracy (1990) is best described as Adventure, Comedy, Crime. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Dick Tracy worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.1/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this adventure lane.
